recipes.title: Minimal fix debug loop
recipes.raw_prompt: Debug this failure. First reproduce with the smallest command/test. Then isolate root cause. Propose the smallest correct fix. Do not refactor unrelated code. Show verification steps.
recipes.skeleton:
Debug {{error_or_symptom}}.
1) Reproduce with the smallest command/test
2) Isolate root cause
3) Minimal correct fix only
4) Verification steps

Current task:
{{task}}

recipes.title: PR security review
recipes.raw_prompt: Review this PR for security issues. Prioritize authz, injection, SSRF, and secret leakage. Output Critical/Warning/Suggestion with file locations and concrete fixes. Skip pure style nits.
recipes.skeleton:
Security-review {{diff_or_files}}.
Prioritize: authz, injection, SSRF, secret leakage.
Output: Critical/Warning/Suggestion with locations + fixes.
Skip pure style nits.

Current task:
{{task}}
